strengths: Exceeds 15-year requirement with 20 years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Demonstrates technical versatility and continuous learning—proficient in multiple languages and frameworks; founded open-source GISCollective platform and organized technical workshops
Currently engaged with AI infrastructure at re:cinq (MCP generators, agentic workflows), showing active pivot toward AI-adjacent technologies
concerns: Limited AI/ML expertise—only recent exposure through current role; no demonstrated products, platforms, or deep learning systems built with AI despite role requiring 'recognized expertise with demonstrated AI products'

Unclear director-level strategic impact—most roles titled 'Senior' or 'Staff' with execution-focused experience; insufficient evidence of company-wide technical strategy, team building, or architectural decisions at organizational scale
Generalist technical background may not provide specialized depth expected for a principal-level AI strategy role requiring strategic customer advisory and cutting-edge technology differentiation
response.justification: Bogdan possesses strong foundational software engineering credentials and demonstrates continuous technical growth across multiple domains. However, this director-level AI strategy role explicitly requires recognized expertise in AI with proven products or platforms—areas where the candidate shows only recent exposure. The current role touches AI infrastructure, but lacks the depth of prior AI/ML work, strategic influence, or demonstrated ability to advise organizations on cutting-edge AI adoption that the position demands. While a compelling generalist engineer, the specialized AI focus and strategic scope of this principal role appear misaligned with the candidate's experience trajectory.
